name: otelcol-confmap-promotion
description: Find promoted OpenTelemetry Collector config decoders that can reject or silently skip sibling fields.
targetUsers: Maintainers of custom OpenTelemetry Collector receivers, processors, exporters, and extensions who upgrade Collector or embedded helper dependencies.
jobToBeDone: Before merging a dependency upgrade, identify an embedded or squashed config decoder's declaration owner, affected sibling fields, and source location so the maintainer can choose a nested config or a tested explicit decoder.
distributionPath: Checksum-verified reproducible Linux and macOS archives, go install, a standard go vet vettool, and an offline composite GitHub Action pinned by full commit SHA.
successMetric: Within 30 days, one unrelated custom Collector repository uses the analyzer to catch a real decode regression or silent sibling-loss risk before merge and shows the config or preservation-test fix.

demandEvidence.independenceKey: collector core embedded config invalid sibling failure
collector helper promotion invalid key regression
sawmills custom collector promoted decoder fix

alternatives.name: otelcorecol v0.157.0 validate
alternatives.gap: Detects the invalid runtime key but does not identify the promoted decoder owner or its source location.

alternatives.name: Go 1.26.5 vet and Staticcheck 2026.1
alternatives.gap: Both passed the original unsafe type graph without connecting the promoted confmap method to parent sibling fields.

alternatives.name: OpenTelemetry Collector schemagen v0.157.0
alternatives.gap: Generated separate parent and helper shapes without warning that the promoted decoder can own the parent decode path.

alternatives.name: Named nested config or explicit parent decoder with preservation tests
alternatives.gap: These are effective fixes after the risky structure is known, but do not locate every promotion or squash site before an upgrade.

duplicateSearch.summary: Ran pinned runtime validation, Go vet, Staticcheck, and schemagen against the same original fixtures; none produced the bounded OCP001 owner, sibling, and source-location distinction.

differentiation: A network-free Go source analyzer limited to confmap-compatible method promotion and squash risks, with deterministic owner, sibling, relative-location, unknown, and exit contracts across CLI, SARIF, vettool, and CI.
